notes: Refers to the unfair treatment of people based on characteristics such as race, gender, religion, or age.

sentences.german: Diskriminierung am Arbeitsplatz ist in Deutschland verboten.
sentences.english: Discrimination in the workplace is prohibited in Germany.

sentences.german: Viele Menschen kämpfen gegen Diskriminierungen aufgrund ihrer Herkunft.
sentences.english: Many people fight against discrimination based on their origin.
